nodes.name: Focused Pulse Emitters
nodes.effect: All pulse weapon damage +8%. Burst fire accuracy +5%.
nodes.notes: Precision becomes more precise — the compounding foundation

nodes.name: Overcharged Plasma Cells
nodes.effect: Unlocks Overcharged Plasma mode (+15% damage, +20% heat generation, overheats after 6s). All energy weapons +5%.
nodes.notes: More damage at the cost of sustained fire — situational but devastating

nodes.name: EMP Integration
nodes.effect: Unlocks EMP Pulse variant (−5% damage, disables target's system module for 4s). 3% chance to disable on any hit.
nodes.notes: Anti-vehicle disruption — stops mechs and tanks cold

nodes.name: Ion Accelerator Development
nodes.effect: Unlocks Ion Accelerator (Rare: disables vehicles 3s per hit). All energy weapons +10% vs vehicles.
nodes.notes: Vehicles cease to function — precision doctrine's hard counter to armor

nodes.name: Predictive Fire Control
nodes.effect: First shot vs any new target +25% accuracy. First shot receives full Mark bonus as if target was pre-Marked.
nodes.notes: CULMINATION — eliminates Tactical Link's cold-contact disadvantage entirely

nodes.name: Enhanced Marker Arrays
nodes.effect: Mark accuracy bonus +3% (to +18%). Mark duration +1 second (to 9s).
nodes.notes: PRIMARY mechanic upgrade — longer, stronger Marks cascade across the network

nodes.name: Drone Network Expansion
nodes.effect: All units receive +1 support drone. Drone sensor range +20%. Drones gain light self-defense capability.
nodes.notes: More drones, better drones — the network sees everything

nodes.name: Tactical Network Hub Distribution
nodes.effect: Hub equipment effectiveness +75% (from +50%). Effect range extended to 40m.
nodes.notes: Stronger amplification at greater range — Mark bonuses saturate the field

nodes.name: Multi-Spectrum Targeting
nodes.effect: Sensor Array detects ALL hidden or stealthed units. Marked Targets cannot benefit from cover of any kind.
nodes.notes: Nothing hides, cover becomes meaningless — precision doctrine's peak expression

nodes.name: Predictive Targeting AI Deployment
nodes.effect: Unlocks Predictive Targeting AI equipment. Entire fleet +5% base accuracy. Link extends to coalition allies (+8% Mark sharing).
nodes.notes: CULMINATION — coalition allies benefit from Accord targeting network

nodes.name: Cultural Exchange Programs
nodes.effect: Influence income +15%. Embassy building generates +1 Influence/cycle.
nodes.notes: More Influence faster — the Accord's strategic resource advantage compounds

nodes.name: Diplomatic Corps Training
nodes.effect: Audience success rate +15%. Demand/Threaten actions +20% effective. Betrayal recovery time −2 cycles.
nodes.notes: Silver tongue sharpens — relationships repair faster too

nodes.name: Coalition Coordination Protocols
nodes.effect: Allied factions contribute +1 auxiliary fleet to joint operations. Alliance upkeep cost −20%.
nodes.notes: Stronger alliances at lower cost — the Unification path becomes viable

nodes.name: Interspecies Trust Architecture
nodes.effect: Maximum simultaneous alliances +1 (3 vs standard 2). Allied reputation decay rate −50%.
nodes.notes: Larger coalition — essential for the Unification ending path

nodes.name: Galactic Congress Protocol
nodes.effect: Unification path: alliance formation costs −50%. Coalition shares vision and supply networks. Congress Vote: all allies follow Accord strategic direction for 5 cycles.
nodes.notes: CULMINATION — leads a GOVERNMENT, not just an alliance

nodes.name: Advanced Metallurgy
nodes.effect: Unlocks Solid-State Tungsten ammunition (+20% vs Core Guardians). All railgun weapons +5% damage.
nodes.notes: First step to solving the Guardian problem — kinetic doctrine begins

nodes.name: Broadside-Battlesuit Deployment
nodes.effect: Unlocks Broadside-Battlesuit production. 6 cycles at Advanced War Factory.
nodes.notes: Walking firebase — twin synchronized railguns dominating entire sectors

nodes.name: Corona-Titan Construction
nodes.effect: Unlocks Corona-Titan flagship. Requires Shipyard + 9 cycles.
nodes.notes: Sun Cannon — stellar energy focusing array

nodes.name: Seeker Round Development
nodes.effect: Unlocks Seeker Rounds equipment (+30% accuracy vs Marked targets). All guided munitions +10% tracking precision.
nodes.notes: Munitions literally chase Marked targets — Tactical Link extends into the projectiles themselves

nodes.name: Sun Cannon Optimization
nodes.effect: Corona-Titan Sun Cannon charge time 15s→10s. Beam duration 3s→5s. Tracking arc ±30° while firing. All Accord energy weapons fleet-wide +10%.
nodes.notes: CULMINATION — superweapon efficiency trickles down to entire fleet
